gist.headline: Welcome to the Lab
gist.blurb: PromptLab Studio just landed in the ecosystem. It's a structured prompt engineering workspace built on top of our API for generating images and text.
gist.summary: Added PromptLab Studio, a structured prompt engineering workspace, to the community app showcase.
gist.impact: Creators now have a dedicated, structured environment to craft and test prompts for image and text generation.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy digital laboratory. Polly the bee wearing tiny safety goggles, mixing glowing 'prompt' ingredients in beakers that sprout into code-plants. Represents the 'PromptLab' concept.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute bee mascot wearing tiny safety goggles, mixing glowing potions in a cozy digital laboratory where code-plants sprout from glass beakers. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
